title: From Market.
content:
Oh who'll give us Posies,
    And Garlands of Roses,
    To twine round our heads so gay?
    For here we come bringing
    You many good wishes to-day.
    From market--from market--from market--
    We all come up from market.
meaning:
Kate Greenaway's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "From Market."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
